description: Environment setup - install dependencies, verify baseline build passes, install lucide-react icon library required by the design bible.
steps: Run 'mise trust' and 'bun install' to set up the environment
Run 'bun run lint' and 'bun run build' to confirm the baseline is green (it should be - verified during exploration)
Run 'bun run build' again to confirm the new dependency doesn't break anything
acceptance_criteria: bun run lint passes with 0 errors
bun run build succeeds with all pages generated
lucide-react is listed in package.json dependencies
